stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
Calculate the CG position and moment for the BASIC EMPTY MASS by using the data given from the attached table:

options.a: 113.6 in aft of datum and the moment is 430 998 in.lb
options.b: 95.3 in aft of datum and the moment is 380 373 in.lb
options.c: 115.7 in aft of datum and the moment is 365 074 in.lb
options.d: 111.4 in aft of datum and the moment is 489 666 in.lb
